description: Discovery metadata for Hellenic Complex Systems Laboratory public web resources and browser-exposed WebMCP tools.

transport.description: The homepage registers browser WebMCP tools when the user agent supports document.modelContext.registerTool or navigator.modelContext.provideContext.

tools.name: hcsl.search
tools.description: Search the main public HCSL resource categories by keyword and return matching links.

tools.name: hcsl.list_resources
tools.description: Return public HCSL resource links, optionally filtered by category.

tools.name: hcsl.site_summary
tools.description: Return a concise summary of HCSL scope, status, and agent discovery endpoints.

tools.name: hcsl.open_section
tools.description: Navigate the browser to a selected public HCSL section.
